message:
feat(fcp-mesh): V3 placement policy types and decision evidence (FCP Spec Section 11.2)

New placement policy type hierarchy for capability-grant-driven node
selection:

PlacementPolicy: combines hard requirements (DeviceRequirement),
soft preferences (DevicePreference), exclusion patterns (DevicePattern),
and zone restrictions.

DeviceRequirement variants: Gpu (min VRAM), Memory, OnPower, Software,
Network (min bandwidth), TailscaleTag, ConnectorAvailable (with
optional min version), SecretReconstructable (min nodes for threshold
secret), ZoneQuotaHeadroom.

DevicePreference variants: LowLatency, HighResources, SpecificDevice
(affinity), DataLocality (object co-location) — all with weight_bps.

DevicePattern variants: NodeId, Tag, Zone, AvailabilityProfile.

PlacementDecisionEvidence: auditable evidence struct capturing
request_object_id, connector_id, chosen_node, candidate_scores,
degraded_mode flag, limiting_factors, reason_code, timing, and
inclusion/exclusion counts.

CandidateScore: per-node scoring breakdown with eligibility flag,
requirement/preference/exclusion details, and composite score.

PlacementPolicyIntersection: merge multiple policies from different
capability grants — union requirements, merge preferences, union
exclusions, intersect zones.

Tests for serde round-trip, intersection semantics, and evidence
serialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
